opportunities.title: WP2Shell: The WordPress RCE That's Turning Millions of Sites Into Botnet Fodder
opportunities.why_now: A critical WordPress vulnerability is being mass-exploited right now, with both The Register and Dark Reading confirming millions of sites at risk and public exploit code fueling scanning.
opportunities.angle: Breach-digest explainer: what WP2Shell does, who's exploiting it, and a patch-now checklist for site admins

opportunities.title: SonicWall Knew for Weeks: Zero-Days Delivered Custom Malware Before a Patch Existed
opportunities.why_now: SecurityWeek and Bleeping Computer both confirm SonicWall SMA1000 zero-days were actively weaponized with bespoke malware ahead of any fix, a textbook patch-cadence failure.
opportunities.angle: Timeline piece charting exploit-to-patch gap, framed as the 'inevitable breach' case study of the week

opportunities.title: Qilin Ransomware Is Already Inside Your Palo Alto VPN
opportunities.why_now: A critical GlobalProtect VPN bug is being actively exploited by the Qilin ransomware gang, per Bleeping Computer, making this an urgent enterprise patch alert.
opportunities.angle: Rapid-fire CVE alert: affected versions, IOCs, and why VPN edge devices remain ransomware's favorite door

opportunities.title: Days, Not Months: ServiceNow Vuln Goes From Disclosure to Exploitation at Record Speed
opportunities.why_now: SecurityWeek and The Hacker News both report active exploitation of a ServiceNow AI Platform flaw within days of disclosure, underscoring the shrinking patch window.
opportunities.angle: Data-driven piece on exploitation-speed trends (SonicWall, ServiceNow, WordPress all this week) as proof patch cadence is losing the race

opportunities.title: Estée Lauder's Oracle EBS Breach Is the Zero-Day Bill Coming Due
opportunities.why_now: Estée Lauder just disclosed customer/employee data impact from the Oracle E-Business Suite zero-day, adding a marquee name to the growing victim list from this campaign.
opportunities.angle: Named-victim breach recap tying Estée Lauder to the wider Oracle EBS zero-day wave, with a running tally of confirmed victims
